'''Tieren Nie-Tan''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Jedi training/Legends|trained]] in [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]], Tieren Nie-Tan had achieved the rank of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] sometime before [[33 BBY/Legends|33 BBY]]. In that year, a [[Yinchorri Uprising|series of uprisings]] were springing up throughout the [[Yinchorri system]], a conflict which drew most of the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]] away from [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. Stationed at the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] on Coruscant at the time, Jedi Nie-Tan was present when a group of [[Yinchorri/Legends|Yinchorri]] infiltrated the [[Tower of First Knowledge/Legends|Tower of First Knowledge]] in an attempt to slay the [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|Jedi Initiates]] housed there. The Jedi in the Temple attacked the raiding party in force, Nie-Tan among their number. While the invaders were repelled, Jedi Nie-Tan lost his life in the [[Raid on the Jedi Temple (Yinchorri Uprising)|fighting]]; the only casualty aside from him was fellow Jedi Knight [[Jude Rozess]].<ref name="AOW" />

==Behind the scenes==
Jedi Tieren Nie-Tan was created by [[Randy Stradley]] for the [[Jedi Council: Acts of War 2|second issue]] of the [[Star Wars: Jedi Council: Acts of War|Jedi Council: Acts of War]] comic book arc. Depicted only after the fighting, dead in the arms of a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] and a [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] Jedi, this has been Jedi Nie-Tan's only appearance to date. He appears to be of an orange-skinned species with floppy ears and a canine-like snout.
